description: Headless IDA Pro MCP Server for AI-powered binary analysis
post_install: $idaPaths = @('C:\Program Files\IDA Professional 9.3','C:\Program Files\IDA Pro 9.3','C:\Program Files\IDA Home 9.3','C:\Program Files\IDA Essential 9.3','C:\Program Files\IDA Professional 9.2','C:\Program Files\IDA Pro 9.2')
Write-Host 'IDA Pro not found in standard locations. Set IDADIR manually or add IDA to PATH.'
post_uninstall: $idaPaths = @('C:\Program Files\IDA Professional 9.3','C:\Program Files\IDA Pro 9.3','C:\Program Files\IDA Home 9.3','C:\Program Files\IDA Essential 9.3','C:\Program Files\IDA Professional 9.2','C:\Program Files\IDA Pro 9.2')
notes: Requires IDA Pro 9.x with a valid license. IDADIR is auto-detected from standard install paths.
